final:
module RefModule (
    input [3:0] d,
    input we,
    input re,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory <= d; // Write data to memory
        end
        if (re) begin
            q <= memory; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
endmodule
